canonical_definition: A quantifiable measure of the semantic correspondence and proximity between visual token embeddings and their corresponding text representations in the language model's input space.
papers: ProtoVQA: An Adaptable Prototypical Framework for Explainable Fine-Grained Visual Question Answering
